# Deep Dive Films

> New York-based film and television studio. Documentary and narrative work for streamers, networks, and festivals.

Deep Dive Films is the entertainment arm of Deep Dive. We make documentary and narrative film — features, shorts, and series — for streamers, networks, and the festival circuit.

## Selected films

- What Will I Become? (2026 feature documentary, Berlinale premiere, exec produced by Harper Steele)
- Big Bass (2025 short documentary, Palm Springs ShortFest Jury Prize)
- Fireboys (2022 feature documentary, HBO)

## Contact

- Website: https://deepdivefilms.com
- Email: hello@deepdivefilms.com
- Location: Brooklyn, NY

## Pages

- / — Film catalogue
- /films/:slug — Individual film pages
- /about — Studio story
